title: leucanthemum clausonis
intro: Leucanthemum clausonis, also known as White Edged Oxeye Daisy, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Leucanthemum clausonis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential anticancer properties, making it a valuable herb in herbal medicine. The plant is traditionally prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
